title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at DSV India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at DSV India
jsonLd.description:
DSV India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Fleet Manager at our Delhi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About DSV India:
DSV India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DSV India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
